prompt: A receipt from "Grandma's Kitchen & Wisdom Co." in rural Alabama, handwritten in cursive showing peach cobbler, sweet tea, and preserves, on yellowed paper with flour dusting and a pressed flower
prompt_refined: A close-up shot of a vintage receipt from 'Grandma's Kitchen & Wisdom Co.' in rural Alabama. The receipt features handwritten cursive text, clearly listing 'Peach Cobbler,' 'Sweet Tea,' and 'Preserves.' It is printed on deeply yellowed, aged paper, with visible light flour dusting. A small, delicate pressed flower is gently placed on the receipt.
objects: "Grandma's Kitchen & Wisdom Co." text on receipt
